# rubrik_sso_group (List Resource)

The `rubrik_sso_group` list resource lists SSO groups in RSC.

## Example Usage

```terraform
list "rubrik_sso_group" "all" {
  provider = rubrik
}

list "rubrik_sso_group" "by_name" {
  provider = rubrik

  config {
    name = "Auditors"
  }
}

list "rubrik_sso_group" "by_name_and_domain" {
  provider = rubrik

  config {
    name            = "Auditors"
    auth_domain_id  = "1a5629cb-2681-4ea4-b36c-ea8b2f3990cd"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `auth_domain_id` (String) Auth domain ID (identity provider ID) to list SSO groups in.

### Optional

- `name` (String) Filter SSO groups by name. Matches groups whose name contains the given value (case-insensitive).
